|Northern indices |test candidate |cpues.ind |hockeystick.hcr |Chile_AcousN + Peru_Artis | 0| 0.0| 1.50| 1385.0| 0.85| 1.2| 4|SCW17 Paper 09 | ::: ::: ## Interpretation safeguards - `min`, `lim`, `trigger`, and `target` retain their SCW17 test values and units; units must be confirmed in a normative specification before adoption. - `dlow` and `dupp` are interannual lower and upper multipliers where supplied. - Index names are exact `jmMSE` object names, not workshop shorthand. - The three rows called Polynomial10/20/30 in workshop discussions are omitted from the registry because Paper-09 found that the current implementation was loess smoothing, not a polynomial estimator. They may be restored as clearly labelled sensitivity tests. ## Promotion requirement A candidate can move beyond test status only when it has a completed [specification](specification-template.qmd), reproducible performance evidence, an implementation test using frozen inputs, and a decision record identifying the approving body and date.
